componentDescription: A versatile component for displaying headlines and text with various styling and animation options.

_isInView.description: Indicates whether the title component is currently visible within the viewport, often used for scroll-triggered animations.

children.description: The content to be rendered inside the Title component, typically text.

highlightText.description: Specifies text (or an array of texts) to be visually highlighted within the title's children.

alternateHighlightText.description: Provides an array of alternative texts to cycle through for highlighting, creating a dynamic effect.

highlightAnimate.description: Defines animation properties for the highlighted text, allowing for custom motion effects.

highlightTypewriter.description: Enables a typewriter effect for the highlighted text, revealing it character by character.

highlightTypewriterDuration.description: Sets the duration (in milliseconds) for the typewriter animation effect.

highlightSlide.description: Enables a slide-in effect for the highlighted text.

highlightSlideDuration.description: Sets the duration (in milliseconds) for the slide-in animation effect.

highlightSlideStagger.description: Specifies a stagger delay (in milliseconds) for each character or word in the slide-in animation.

highlightSlideSequential.description: Determines if highlighted slides appear one after another sequentially, rather than all at once.

highlightStyle.description: Defines the visual style for the highlighted text (e.g., underline, background fill).

highlightColor.description: Sets the primary color for the highlight effect.

highlightSecondaryColor.description: Sets a secondary color for complex highlight styles that may involve gradients or dual-color effects.

animate.description: Defines general animation properties for the entire title component, not just the highlighted parts.

animationLoop.description: Controls how many times the main animation should loop, or 'infinite' for continuous looping.

highlightAnimationLoop.description: Controls how many times the highlight animation should loop, or 'infinite' for continuous looping.

size.description: Specifies the predefined size of the title (e.g., 'small', 'medium', 'large').

responsive.description: Enables or disables responsive behavior for the title, adapting its appearance to different screen sizes.

views.description: Allows custom styling to be applied to different parts or states of the title component.

alternateAnimation.description: Enables an alternative animation sequence or style for the component.

alternateDuration.description: Sets the duration (in milliseconds) for the alternate animation effect.
